speaker: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
text: The Democratic Party did betray its working-class base by dismissing as 'too extreme' the policy demands — $15 minimum wage, tuition-free public college, expanded Medicare — that working people themselves were calling for, while simultaneously claiming to listen to them.
context: AOC compared her own story (waitress with no health insurance) to Guido's; recounted closed-door meeting where Democratic leadership derided her campaign's populist demands.

grounded_formulations.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
